children.heading: Right of action
children.label: a Right of action
children.text: Any person aggrieved by a decision or action of the Association may, after reasonably exhausting available avenues for resolution within the Association, commence a civil action in an appropriate United States district court, and obtain all appropriate relief.

children.heading: Association interpretations
children.label: b Association interpretations
children.text: In any action under subsection (a), the court shall give appropriate weight to the interpretation of the Association of its bylaws and standards and this subchapter.
